channel.title: Chrome Web Store on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Chrome Web Store on Tech Tracker

item.title: Kiwi Browser - Allows You To Use Chrome Extensions On Android!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-wLiargXrSGY/YIw1Q0f7AII/AAAAAAAAEWQ/Ho3cMUG0W6UgQC4B0emCUmh0otqywKougCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1619801407073509-0.png" alt="Kiwi Browser - Allows You To Use Chrome Extensions On Android!" title="Kiwi Browser - Allows You To Use Chrome Extensions On Android!"> Do you like chrome extensions? but they only work in pc chrome browser because google limited it to only pc they didn’t add chrome extensions on chrome browser of Android due to that people whoever like chrome pc extensions were unable to use the same extensions on chrome Android browser due to no functionality.
